hot_topics.summary: Appeal review completed for 2,000+ users, eligibility checker live April 28, distribution May 8, appeals remain open.

related_posts.content:
SoDEX Testnet Airdrop: Appeal Review Update

The SoDEX Testnet airdrop appeal review has been completed.

✅ 2,000+ eligible testnet users have been confirmed 
🔍 Eligible users will be able to check their airdrop amount on the SoDEX Testnet starting Apr 28, 12:00 UTC
🎁 Final airdrop distribution is expected to be completed on May 8, 12:00 UTC
Check here: https://t.co/1ZCnIrwaG8

If you believe you were missed, the appeal channel remains open. Please submit your appeal as soon as possible.

🔗 Submit here:

---

SoSoValue AMA #2 Snapshot & Distribution dates!!

📸SoSoValue Season 2 Snapshot, SoSoValue Season 3 confirmed, Ruv clarification, Snapshot dates Announced & more

Testnet airdrop:
- Eligibility checker live on 28th (next tuesday) on the testnet pages
- Testnet airdrop distribution on may 8th
- Appeal channels will remain open after April 28

SoSoValue S2 Snapshot
- 3 seperate, randomly timed snapshot during May
- Eligibility Critera based on these snapshots, ruv & overall sosovalue and sodex activites
- Final announcement & Distribution end of May

Ruv (Real User Verification):
- Having below 100% Real Human Verification, but above 0% does not mean you are ineligible

Everything is from the community call...

official_announcements.content:
SoDEX Testnet Airdrop: Appeal Review Update

The SoDEX Testnet airdrop appeal review has been completed.

✅ 2,000+ eligible testnet users have been confirmed 
🔍 Eligible users will be able to check their airdrop amount on the SoDEX Testnet starting Apr 28, 12:00 UTC
🎁 Final airdrop distribution is expected to be completed on May 8, 12:00 UTC
Check here: https://t.co/1ZCnIrwaG8

If you believe you were missed, the appeal channel remains open. Please submit your appeal as soon as possible.

🔗 Submit here:

---

SoDEX V3's been on Mainnet for a while now.                                     
                                                                                     
Now we're opening the floor: break it, and we'll pay you in $SOSO.
                                                                                                                                 
Any valid trading-related bug counts. The nastier, the bigger the bounty.        
                                           
Submit it

Notice the bell in the top-right?             
                                   
Everyone has a letter waiting. Most are the same. A few are not.  

Open yours. Drop the screenshot below 👇 — let's see who got the quiet one.  #SoDEXDrops #SoDEX
